caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap and a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT" printed on the chest sits in a studio setting. He has both hands raised with palms facing outward, gesturing while speaking. He wears a gold bracelet on each wrist. In front of him is a professional microphone on a stand. The background is a light-colored wall featuring stars and the words "EMPRESS HUSTLE," while a red and white "BOSS" logo is visible behind him. Across the bottom of the screen, a red and black overlay displays the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST." Across the sequence of frames, the man's facial expression shifts slightly as he speaks, and his hands move subtly, maintaining his expressive gesture throughout the clip.
